missingEnv: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY
FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or FOOTBALL_DATA_ORG_TOKEN or VITE_FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or deployed data proxy with FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN
APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY

stages.label: Deploy free feed CORS proxy
stages.detail: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs to Cloudflare Workers, or deploy the bundled Pages function and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1.

stages.label: Preflight realtime data providers
requiredEnv: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY
APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY
missingEnv: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY
FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or FOOTBALL_DATA_ORG_TOKEN or VITE_FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or deployed data proxy with FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN
APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY
stages.detail: API-Football key: Set VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY for direct browser calls, or deploy the data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY so lineups, injuries, standings and API-Football odds can be read back without exposing the key. Football-Data.org matches and standings backup: Set FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN on the Worker/Pages runtime, or VITE_FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN for direct diagnostics, so matches and standings can be read back as the stable schedule/ranking backup. Odds provider: Configure API-Football odds through VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or the data proxy APIFOOTBALL_KEY, or set VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY with server-side ODDS_API_KEY on the data proxy. Static hosting data proxy: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs as a Worker URL, or deploy the bundled Pages function and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1.

stages.label: Scout realtime fixture targets
requiredEnv: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY
missingEnv: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY
stages.detail: Find 3 World Cup fixtures where lineups, injuries, odds and standings all return live rows; set KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_FIXTURE_IDS to validate known candidates directly.

stages.label: Verify realtime production data
requiredEnv: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY
missingEnv: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY
FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or FOOTBALL_DATA_ORG_TOKEN or VITE_FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or deployed data proxy with FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN
APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY
stages.detail: Verify free feed continuity, API-Football lineups/injuries/odds/standings read-back and optional The Odds API H2H read-back.

copyText:
Kickoff Lock Agent realtime data production bootstrap
Mode: plan
Stages: 1/4 ready or done
Missing env: VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 with VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY, FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or FOOTBALL_DATA_ORG_TOKEN or VITE_FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or deployed data proxy with FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN, APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY, VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_SIGNAL_MATRIX
Next action: Deploy free feed CORS proxy: run bun run data:proxy:deploy.
Commands:
- bun run data:proxy:deploy
- bun run data:providers:check
- bun run scout:data-targets
- bun run doctor:data
Realtime data read-back commands:
- Data proxy health: Set VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 before reading data proxy health.
- openfootball World Cup 2026 JSON: curl -sS 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openfootball/worldcup.json/master/2026/worldcup.json'
- TheSportsDB World Cup season feed: curl -sS 'https://www.thesportsdb.com/api/v1/json/123/eventsseason.php?id=4429&s=2026'
- API-Football standings: Set VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 before reading API-Football standings.
- Football-Data matches: Set VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 before reading Football-Data matches.
- Football-Data standings: Set VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 before reading Football-Data standings.
- The Odds API H2H: Set VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 before reading The Odds API H2H.
Stages:
- Deploy free feed CORS proxy [ready]
  command: bun run data:proxy:deploy
  execute: bun run data:proxy:deploy
  requires: wrangler login or CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
  missing: VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 with VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL
  outputs: VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL, VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN
  detail: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs to Cloudflare Workers, or deploy the bundled Pages function and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1.
- Preflight realtime data providers [blocked]
  command: bun run data:providers:check
  execute: bun run data:providers:check
  requires: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY, VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1, VITE_APIFOOTBALL_ENRICHMENT_LIMIT, KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_LIMIT, KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_FIXTURE_IDS, KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_TARGETS, APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY
  missing: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY, FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or FOOTBALL_DATA_ORG_TOKEN or VITE_FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or deployed data proxy with FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN, APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY, VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1
  outputs: provider readiness evidence
  detail: API-Football key: Set VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY for direct browser calls, or deploy the data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY so lineups, injuries, standings and API-Football odds can be read back without exposing the key. Football-Data.org matches and standings backup: Set FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN on the Worker/Pages runtime, or VITE_FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN for direct diagnostics, so matches and standings can be read back as the stable schedule/ranking backup. Odds provider: Configure API-Football odds through VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or the data proxy APIFOOTBALL_KEY, or set VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY with server-side ODDS_API_KEY on the data proxy. Static hosting data proxy: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs as a Worker URL, or deploy the bundled Pages function and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1.
- Scout realtime fixture targets [blocked]
  command: bun run scout:data-targets
  execute: bun run scout:data-targets
  requires: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY, optional KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_FIXTURE_IDS
  missing: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY
  outputs: KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_SIGNAL_MATRIX
  detail: Find 3 World Cup fixtures where lineups, injuries, odds and standings all return live rows; set KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_FIXTURE_IDS to validate known candidates directly.
- Verify realtime production data [blocked]
  command: bun run doctor:data
  execute: bun run doctor:data
  requires: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY, VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1, APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_SIGNAL_MATRIX
  missing: APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY, FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or FOOTBALL_DATA_ORG_TOKEN or VITE_FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN or deployed data proxy with FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN, APIFOOTBALL_KEY or VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY or VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY, VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_SIGNAL_MATRIX
  outputs: realtime production evidence
  detail: Verify free feed continuity, API-Football lineups/injuries/odds/standings read-back and optional The Odds API H2H read-back.
